headline: Mizuho Trims Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Target, Remains Bullish on Brokers
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) is included among the 10 Fastest Growing Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. On April 13, Mizuho lowered its price recommendation on Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) to $259 from $260. It maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm updated its estimates and targets across its North […]
